channel.title: machine learning on zwebrain
channel.description: Recent content in machine learning on zwebrain

item.title: Note - CS 330 Deep Multi-Task and Meta Learning
item.description: Course: CS 330 Deep Multi-Task and Meta Learning (stanford.edu) Lecture videos: Youtube or Bilibili Lecture 1 Deep learning allows us to handle unstructured inputs without hand-engineering features with less domain knowledge. For “few-shot learning”, leveraging prior experience, learning quickly something new. For multi-task learning, different tasks need to share some structure. Learn all of the tasks more quickly or more proficiently than learning them independently. Lecture 2
